name: QuickAdd
usage_hint: Lightweight add-to-cart button for collection pages. Shows single-variant instant add or multi-variant dropdown selector. Used inside ProductCard or standalone in grids.
when_to_use: Use on collection pages where space is limited and you need quick add-to-cart without navigating to PDP. Ideal for cards, grids, and list views.
when_not_to_use: Not for PDP main purchase UI (use BuyBox). Not for sticky follow-up CTAs (use StickyBar). Not when you need quantity selection or detailed variant info (use BuyBox).
combine_with: ProductCard (QuickAdd is commonly used inside ProductCard)
anti_patterns: Using on PDP: wrong pattern; PDP should use BuyBox for full purchase experience
Omitting CartDrawer: users get no cart confirmation feedback
Using for products with many variants (5+): dropdown becomes unwieldy; navigate to PDP instead
Setting animate:false globally: removes dropdown scale-in and success checkmark animations

shape.title: string
shape.variants: array<{id: string, title: string, price: string, available: boolean}>
